prompt: Minimalist logo on pure white background. Horizontal composition, two elements side by side. LEFT ELEMENT: A yellow (#FAFA00) rectangular border/frame, portrait orientation (taller than wide). The frame has thick sharp yellow borders with solid white fill inside. Inside the frame, exactly TWO large black capital letter M characters placed side by side horizontally reading 'MM' — NOT stacked vertically, just two M letters next to each other on ONE line. The MM text is bold condensed sans-serif (like Impact font), filling about 70% of the frame width. RIGHT ELEMENT: To the right of the yellow frame, the word 'AGENCY.' in the same bold condensed black sans-serif font. The period at the end is a small yellow (#FAFA00) square dot. The word AGENCY is vertically centered with the frame. CRITICAL: Only TWO letter Ms inside the frame, side by side on one line. Sharp 90-degree corners. No rounded corners. No shadows. No gradients. Clean flat vector graphic design. Ultra sharp edges, perfect geometry.
